'''Andowyne''' was a [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-imbued [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Kathol Rift/Legends|Kathol Rift]].<ref name="shadowwar" /> It was the home planet of the [[Brownie]], [[Daikini]], [[Nelwyn]]<ref name="brownie" /><ref name="madmartigan" /><ref name="thorndrumheller" /> and possibly [[Midi-chlorian/Legends|midi-chlorian]] life forms. The planet was forgotten for many years by [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] at large, but was later rediscovered by [[Jedi historian]]s in the [[Jedi Archives/Legends|Jedi Archives]].<ref name="shadowwar" />

==Behind the scenes==
Andowyne was named in a series of databank entries published on April Fool's Day [[2006]] by [[StarWars.com]]. The update page indicated that the [[Willow (film)#The Shadow War Chronicles|''Shadow War Chronicles'']] novels would be republished as a ''Star Wars'' omnibus, and that the [[Willow (film)|''Willow'']] continuity would be added to the ''Star Wars'' continuity. Two days later, a disclaimer was added to the update page revealing that the Databank entries were a joke and that the novels were still non-canon.<ref name="shadowwar" />
